# Phase 0 baseline — 2026-06-09

Plan: docs/build/plans/frontend-teardown-agent-only-plan-2026-06-05.md

## Build gates

| Check | Result | Notes |
| ----- | ------ | ----- |
| pnpm typecheck | PASS | 0 errors |
| pnpm validate:all | PARTIAL | Layers 2–5 LOCKED/VALIDATED; research:tree-check failed (14 missing leader dirs — pre-existing) |
| pnpm build | PASS | Production build succeeded |

## Env

- check:env: PASS
- AI_AGENTS_BASE_URL, AI_AGENTS_SERVICE_SECRET, AI_AGENTS_TENANT_ORG_ID: set

## Snapshots (pre-teardown)

- routes: docs/build/plans/_snapshots/routes-pre-teardown.txt (92 page.tsx files)
- components: docs/build/plans/_snapshots/component-counts-pre-teardown.txt (374 live ts/tsx under src/components excl. _archive)

## Agent surfaces (dev on :3001)

| Surface | Result | Notes |
| ------- | ------ | ----- |
| GET /agent | PARTIAL | 200 when x-movemental-shell: room; 500 without (SiteHeader next/image in dev) — proxy should inject room shell |
| POST /api/agent-room/stream | FAIL | HTTP 500 — upstream engine path returned error HTML |
| GET /agent-runtime | NOT VERIFIED | Requires staff login; same layout chrome issue in dev without dashboard shell |

Port 3000 serves movemental-agentic-front-end static prototype (not movemental-ai).

## Phase 1 executed 2026-06-09

- Archived src/app/(site)/ → _archive/pre-marketing-migration-2026-06/app/(site)/
- Preserved src/app/login/, src/app/forgot-password/
- Added src/app/page.tsx → redirect /agent
